rag_rules: Delete AGREE clauses referencing unresolved AADL properties like Source_Stack_Size; they are not automatically in expression scope.
generic_rules: Repair only by removing invalid clauses, never by inventing declarations or altering architecture.
Preserve scope boundaries: never reference implementation-level elements in component type annexes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE scalar types are int, real, bool — never use integer, boolean, or AADL property names as variables.
Event ports cannot be used in numeric or Boolean comparisons unless explicitly bound to a data value.
anti_patterns: Do not convert AADL properties into AGREE variables or attempt to infer numeric values from opaque/Boolean ports.
